name: charts-docs
description: Documentation website built with Next.js and deployed on Vercel.

items.name: Next.js
items.description: React framework for production-grade web applications.

items.name: React
items.description: JavaScript library for building user interfaces.

items.name: TypeScript
items.description: Typed superset of JavaScript that compiles to plain JavaScript.

items.description: Markdown component for React used to render documentation content.

items.description: Parses YAML front-matter from markdown and content files.

items.description: Syntax highlighter powered by TextMate grammars for accurate code highlighting.

items.name: remark-gfm
items.description: Plugin to support GitHub Flavored Markdown in remark.

items.name: clsx
items.description: Utility for conditionally constructing className strings.

items.name: tailwind-merge
items.description: Utility to merge Tailwind CSS classes without style conflicts.

items.name: Vercel
items.description: Cloud platform for frontend deployment and hosting.

items.name: Microsoft Clarity
items.description: Free user behavior analytics with session recordings and heatmaps.

items.name: AWS (S3 + CloudFront)
items.description: Object storage and CDN used to host and distribute documentation assets globally.
